parsed_review.summary: CP00-475 read-only review complete: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS. Descriptor-only pack with exact 10-unit scope, full implementation/test/contract/validator consistency, correct no-write/no-real-data/read-only-Claude boundaries, production_ready=false (no overclaim), and all local validation gates green. One non-blocking P3 in a harness metadata artifact. Pack and goal closeout are not blocked; final approval stays with the human/harness.

findings.title: changed-file-scope.json tags the pack's own evidence dir as an unrelated preserved file
findings.details: The pack's own evidence directory 'docs/closeout-packs/cp00-475/' and 'docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md' appear in both untracked_implementation_files (lines 131-132) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 137-138). The manifest's worktree_transition_policy.unrelated_dirty_files_preserved does not list these entries (it lists the docx, workbook matter docs, and the ldip json). This is a cosmetic categorization redundancy in a harness-generated scope artifact and has no impact on pack implementation, validation gates, or the closeout decision; the reviewer correctly did not attribute any unrelated dirty file to the pack.
findings.recommendation: Optionally reconcile the changed-file-scope generator so the pack's own evidence directory is not simultaneously tagged under unrelated_dirty_files_preserved. Non-blocking; safe to defer or ignore at harness-owner discretion.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking observation; pack and goal closeout may proceed. Defer/ignore at harness-owner discretion.
